step_rationale: Lipid mediator; inversely correlates with atherosclerosis burden; involved in lipoprotein remodeling.
mechanism: Lysophosphatidylcholine species altered in acute coronary syndrome, marking lipoprotein oxidation and inflammatory lipid-mediator activation.

references.title: Metabolic Profiling Reveals Diagnostic Biomarkers for Distinguishing Myocarditis From Acute Myocardial Infarction.
Multinomial machine learning identifies independent biomarkers by integrated metabolic analysis of acute coronary syndrome.
Metabolomic characterization of myocardial ischemia-reperfusion injury in ST-segment elevation myocardial infarction patients undergoing percutaneous coronary intervention.
